customer_anxiety_profile: Wayne is scam-aware and channel-selective — he avoids text links due to phishing concerns and prefers email. He was mildly irritated by the rep's solar-first opening on a Powerwall-only inquiry. He's cooperative but not enthusiastic; his engagement is transactional. Credit self-assessment was explicitly hedged ('I hope so. By the time it gets there.').
unresolved_concerns: Credit score is self-reported as uncertain and forward-looking — Wayne did not confirm he currently meets the 650/670 threshold.
Dominion bill not yet received — deferred to async email with soft verbal commitment only; no hard confirmation loop.
Wayne's actual Powerwall use case and motivation were never explored — the closer walks in without knowing what problem Wayne is trying to solve.
sensitive_topics_raised: Scam/phishing anxiety — Wayne explicitly cited 'too many links that are getting crazy' as his reason for avoiding texts. Do not send text communications; use email only.
Wayne was irritated that the rep opened with a solar pitch on a Powerwall-only request — do not re-introduce solar unless Wayne raises it.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for Friday the 14th at 11AM by phone.
Rep will send an email (not text) to thewayne.cmiles@gmail.com with bill-collection instructions.
Specialist will show both financing and cash options for the Powerwall.
closer_should_know: Wayne requested Powerwall only — no solar panels. Confirm the Dominion bill arrived before the call; if it hasn't, the closer needs a plan to collect usage data live. Wayne's credit self-assessment was hedged; verify qualification early without making it feel like a re-screen.
